Table DCS_GUEST

Card of table DCS_GUEST

Name

DCS_GUEST

Code

DCS_GUEST

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_GUEST

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_IDENTITY" schema

called "DCS_GUEST".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_GUEST_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(ID, MARKET_CODE,VALID_FROM,_ETL_LOAD_DATETIM))

E

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The data in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

8. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

9.Use "UPDATED_TIMESTAMP" to set up record validity to maintain history (VALID_FROM, VALID_TO)

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD2

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_GUEST

CKT_DCS_GUEST


Server validation rule of the table DCS_GUEST

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_GUEST

drop table DCS_GUEST cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_GUEST
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST (
DCS_GUEST_KEY TEXT not null,
ID INTEGER not null,
TIMESTAMP INTEGER,
CREATION_DATE DATE,
COMPANY_ID INTEGER,
DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY TEXT not null,
STORE TEXT,
EMAIL TEXT,
FIRSTNAME TEXT,
LASTNAME TEXT,
BIRTHDAY DATE,
PHONE TEXT,
LANG_CODE TEXT,
OPT_IN TEXT,
TOKEN TEXT,
UPDATED_TIMESTAMP DATE,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_GUEST primary key (DCS_GUEST_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.DCS_GUEST_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.CREATION_DATE is
'Local date time of order creation - when order was placed';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.COMPANY_ID is
'Store / Company identifier';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.STORE is
'Submarket/company identifier ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.EMAIL is
'User email address';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.FIRSTNAME is
'First name ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.LASTNAME is
'Last name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.PHONE is
'Phone Number';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.LANG_CODE is
'Order language code (EN, FR, ...)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST
add constraint FK_DCS_GUES_R10_STORE_DCS_TOUC foreign key (COMPANY_ID)
references PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT (DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_GUEST
add constraint FK_DCS_GUES_R13_GUEST_DCS_TOUC foreign key (DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY)
references PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT (DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY
